Interface SubscriptionHandler

public interface SubscriptionHandler
Interface for handling subscription events from the Tibber API.

Implementations of this interface can be registered with a subscription to receive real-time measurement data and connection status updates.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    onConnected()
    Called when the subscription is connected.
    void
    onDisconnected(String reason)
    Called when the subscription is disconnected.
    void
    onError(Throwable error)
    Called when an error occurs during the subscription.
    void
    onMeasurement(LiveMeasurement measurement)
    Called when a new measurement is received.

    • onMeasurement

      void onMeasurement(LiveMeasurement measurement)
      Called when a new measurement is received.
      Parameters:
      measurement - the live measurement data

    • onConnected

      Called when the subscription is connected.

    • onDisconnected

      void onDisconnected(String reason)
      Called when the subscription is disconnected.
      Parameters:
      reason - the reason for disconnection

    • onError

      void onError(Throwable error)
      Called when an error occurs during the subscription.
      Parameters:
      error - the error that occurred
